form.formComment: Resuming after seven months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign eighth of 16 at Gowran Park September 20 over 1911m, on heavy track; 23 len behind Amplitude with 61kg at $11. When resuming last campaign ran last of 8 at Ballinrobe Mdn Sw June 23 over 1911m, 28 len behind Nobler carrying 61kg at $29. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at Roscommon October 13 over 1508m, soft track; 4 len behind Millraceflow with 61kg at $5.50.
